name: edu-backend
description: Backend API for the bilingual student-teacher selection platform (Next.js frontend, Node.js backend, MySQL on GoDaddy).

scripts.schema:refresh:after-migrate: npm run db:verify-invariants && npm run schema:export
scripts.schema:publish:release: npm run migrations:validate && npm run schema:refresh:after-migrate
scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-isolation=none test/academicScope.test.js test/teacherSelection.service.test.js test/parentSwitch.cleanup.test.js test/contracts.api.test.js test/parentChangeRequest.helper.test.js test/parentChangeRequest.controllerPaths.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --check-coverage --lines 70 --functions 70 --branches 60 --statements 70 node --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-isolation=none test/academicScope.test.js test/teacherSelection.service.test.js test/parentSwitch.cleanup.test.js test/contracts.api.test.js test/parentChangeRequest.helper.test.js test/parentChangeRequest.controllerPaths.test.js
